name: lac-pro-gate
description: Stateless Cloudflare Worker gate for LAC Pro artifact delivery — validate a Polar license key, stream the compiled Pro artifact from R2.

scripts.types:check: wrangler types --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --check && wrangler types env/worker-configuration.staging.d.ts --env staging --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --check && wrangler types env/worker-configuration.production.d.ts --env production --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --check
